title: Marketplace Manager - Juicy Chemistry - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Juicy Chemistry - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
